title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: January 11, 2025
summary: January 11, 2025: The Arctic sea ice has continued to increase this week but at a lesser rate of 3.09% (as opposed to last week’s increase rate of 3.25%), from the level on 01/02/2025 of 12.525 M km 2 to 12.924 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program M...
